title: SpotifySplashText
description: This resource pack adds various popular songs from Spotify to SplashText
body:
**🎵 SpotifySplashText — Your playlist right in the Minecraft main menu!

SpotifySplashText is a unique resource pack for version 1.21.11 that transforms the standard yellow text (splash text) into a dynamic list of the hottest hits. Now, every time you launch the game, you’ll be greeted by the title of a popular track that millions are listening to right now.
**


![EXAMPLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73f6611bdd6a63bb9c252dc4ee3e52ec6558e4c9.jpeg)
✨ Project Features

🎼 1,000 Most Popular Tracks

We’ve compiled the current top 100 songs from Spotify, VK, and Yandex Music. The list features both legendary artists and newcomers who have taken the charts by storm in 2026.

🇷🇺 Full Cyrillic Localization (Transliteration)

Forget about English titles! All tracks and artists have been adapted for Russian-speaking players.

•
Instead of Cherry Ladies — Черри Ледиес

•
Instead of Big Baby Tape — Биг Бейби Тейп

•
Instead of shadowraze — шадоурейз

This creates a unique atmosphere of “your own” playlist and fits perfectly into the game's interface.

🌌 The perfect complement to your background

The pack pairs perfectly with custom backgrounds (such as anime or space themes), adding a modern musical vibe to your main menu.




🛠 Technical Information

•
Game version: Minecraft 1.21.11 (compatible with 1.21.x)

•
Pack format: 75 (current standard for the latest versions)

•
Files: Replaces the default splashes.txt

•
Performance: The pack is extremely lightweight and has no impact on FPS.



Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
